puzzle.title: The Call of the Miraculous Sign
puzzle.intro: In a time of great prosperity and architectural marvels, a divine message arrived for a people entrenched in their ways. This individual was sent as a warning, bringing with them a unique sign from their Lord, a test for those who would defy the truth. Can you identify this messenger whose call was met with arrogance and ultimately, destruction?
clues: I was sent to a people who carved dwellings into mountains and valleys.
My mission was to call my community to worship Allah alone, away from their idols.
A unique sign was given through me, a creature that emerged from a rock, whose drink was to be respected.
My people challenged me to produce this sign, and when it appeared, they plotted against it.
I warned them of a dire punishment if they harmed the sacred creature, giving them a three-day respite.
Despite my warnings, a group among them conspired and ultimately killed the creature, sealing their fate.
puzzle.arabic: قَالَ هَـٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةٌۭ لَّهَا شِرْبٌۭ وَلَكُمْ شِرْبُ يَوْمٍۢ مَّعْلُومٍۢ
puzzle.verse: He said, "This is a she-camel. For her is a [time of] drink, and for you is a [time of] drink, [each] on a known day. (26:155)
